name: Download dropdown menu opens and shows export options
description: When the user clicks the download/export button in the header, a dropdown menu opens showing export options (auto-download and markdown export).

planSteps.description: Click the download/export button in the top header bar (look for a button with a download icon and a chevron/arrow)
Verify a dropdown menu opens below the button
Verify the dropdown contains at least two export options visible as clickable buttons
Click outside the dropdown menu to close it
Verify the dropdown menu is no longer visible
